title: hydrocotyle foveolata
intro: Hydrocotyle foveolata, also known as Australian pennywort, is a plant species native to Australia, characterized by its small, round leaves and stems that grow in aquatic environments. Traditionally, Australian pennywort has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Australian pennywort include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support cardiovascular health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal supplements and teas. Herbal preparations of Australian pennywort can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or combining them with other herbs in a decoction, and it is also available in capsule or tablet form as a dietary supplement.
